source.note: 2026-07 audit: renamed hit_definitions_json.normal keys (hit1Dmg..hit4Dmg -> 0..3) to match GO's actual target paths -- an admin-built rotation using GO's own naming would otherwise fail with 'no hit definition' errors (same bug class as Klee, see klee.json's source note). Added passive1/dmg (A1 Fragrant Purge: 6% ATK dendro elemental DMG, asc>=1 gate always true for a built character, so not modeled separately -- confirmed against allStat_gen.json skillParam.Emilie.passive1[0][0]=6). All other multiplier values were already correct against GO's Lv10 data, verified byte-for-byte. Added the two C1 bonuses tied to this hit/kit (global +20% skill_dmg_, and +20% all_dmg_ scoped to passive1/dmg only via the hit-scoped passive1dmg_dmg_ key, both sourced from the same constellation1[1]=20 raw value) and the A4 Burning-target all_dmg_ bonus (self_conditional_modifiers_json below) and C2 team dendro RES shred (team_conditional_modifiers_json). C6's Dendro Normal/Charged infusion + ATK-scaled dmgInc is NOT modeled -- it would require alternate infused hit variants (element override), out of scope for this pass; same category of niche mechanic as Venti's Hexerei hex0-5. 2026-07-15 audit fixes: (1) passive1.dmg_mult was 0.06 (6%) -- a 100x error. Confirmed via KQM that A1 Lingering Fragrance's Cleardew Cologne is '600% of Emilie's ATK', and every other multKey in this file already stores its raw decimal fraction directly (e.g. burst level3Dmg_mult=3.9096 for 390.96%, not 3.9096%) -- the '=6' raw sheet value should have been used as 6.0 (600%), not divided by 100 into 0.06 (6%). Fixed to 6.0. (2) a4BurningDmg previously baked a hardcoded flat 36% assuming 2400+ ATK because 'the evaluator has no stat-scaled-and-capped DMG% mechanism' -- that's no longer true (see all_dmg_from_atk_capped_/all_dmg_from_atk_cap_ added to apply_stat_conversions/_batch, same pattern as Furina's salonmember_dmg_from_hp_): the toggle now sets the rate (0.00015 = 0.015%/ATK = 15%/1000 ATK) + cap (0.36) instead of a flat value, so it scales correctly off each build's actual total ATK instead of assuming a fixed threshold. (3) c2DendroResShred's description was missing Cleardew Cologne (A1) as a third trigger source alongside skill/burst -- cosmetic only, the modifier itself (dendro_enemyRes_ -0.3) doesn't depend on which of the three triggered it. STILL FLAGGED, NOT MODELED: C6's Dendro Normal/Charged infusion ('Abiding Fragrance': 5s window after skill/burst, NA/CA converted to Dendro and gain +300% ATK flat bonus dmg) -- would need alternate dendro-infused normal/charged hit variants (element override + dmgIncFromAtk_-style flat bonus scoped to just those variants), a bigger addition than this pass; same category as Klee's still-unmodeled Boom Badge/C2/C4/C6.

self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: C1 Bloom of Reason: increases Fragrance Extraction (Elemental Skill) DMG by 20%.
C1 Bloom of Reason: also increases Fragrant Purge (A1 passive1/dmg hit) DMG by 20%, scoped to that hit only.

A4 Rectification: while the target is Burning, gain a DMG Bonus of +15% per 1000 ATK, capped at 36% (reached at 2400 ATK). Uses apply_stat_conversions'/_batch's all_dmg_from_atk_capped_ + all_dmg_from_atk_cap_ so it scales off the build's actual total ATK instead of assuming 2400+ ATK.

team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: C2: opponents hit by Emilie's Fragrance Extraction (skill), Aromatic Explication (burst), or Cleardew Cologne (A1 passive1/dmg) have their Dendro RES decreased by 30% for 10s.
